items.name: Pink Bandage
items.description:
Love this item? 🌟 Check out my other creations here:
👀 Profile: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Christocream&salesTypeFilter=1
🤝 Group: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Christocreams+Paradise&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

🎉 Don't forget to favorite for a lower price!

Add a soft, adorable touch with the Pink Bandage — a cute aesthetic face accessory made to elevate your avatar’s look. Whether worn as a nose bandage or cheek bandage, this pastel pink detail blends kawaii charm with a clean, minimal design. From light pink and baby pink to hot pink and bubblegum tones, this stylish bandaid adds personality while keeping your fit subtle and polished. Perfect for Y2K and preppy outfits, soft pastel aesthetics, anime cosplay, or creating that “injured but cute” vibe. Pair it with streetwear, cozy fits, or character roleplay looks to enhance your avatar customization with a small but eye-catching detail.
